# gss_inquire_attrs_for_mech(_:_:_:_:)

**Function**

Returns the supported attributes for one or all mechanisms.

## Declaration

```swift
func gss_inquire_attrs_for_mech(_ minor_status: UnsafeMutablePointer<OM_uint32>, _ mech: gss_const_OID, _ mech_attr: UnsafeMutablePointer<gss_OID_set?>?, _ known_mech_attrs: UnsafeMutablePointer<gss_OID_set?>?) -> OM_uint32
```

## Parameters

- **minor_status**: A pointer to the secondary status result that provides additional information in case of failure.
- **mech**: The mechanism to examine, or [doc://com.apple.gss/documentation/GSS/GSS_C_NO_OID] to examine all mechanisms.
- **mech_attr**: A pointer the function uses to return the list of mechanism attributes supported by the mechanism. See Mechanisms and Authentication in [doc://com.apple.gss/documentation/GSS/security-mechanisms] for a list of possible values. Pass `NULL` to ignore this output. If you do receive a set, release its memory with a call to [doc://com.apple.gss/documentation/GSS/gss_release_oid_set(_:_:)] when you are done with it.

## Return Value

A status code set to [doc://com.apple.gss/documentation/GSS/GSS_S_COMPLETE] on success or [doc://com.apple.gss/documentation/GSS/GSS_S_BAD_MECH] if the desired mechanism is unsupported. See [doc://com.apple.gss/documentation/GSS/function-status] for a complete enumeration of status outputs.

## Queries

- **gss_indicate_mechs(_:_:)**: Returns the list of supported underlying security mechanisms.
- **gss_indicate_mechs_by_attrs(_:_:_:_:_:)**: Returns the set of mechanisms that fulfill the given criteria.
- **gss_display_mech_attr(_:_:_:_:_:)**: Returns a human-readable name and description of a mechanism attribute.
- **gss_inquire_mech_for_saslname(_:_:_:)**: Returns the GSS-API mechanism identifier for a given Simple Authentication and Security Layer (SASL) protocol name.
- **gss_inquire_saslname_for_mech(_:_:_:_:_:)**: Returns the Simple Authentication and Security Layer (SASL) protocol name for a given GSS-API mechanism.
